topic: Perplexity Computer vs Manus AI computer agents
insights: Perplexity Computer runs 19 AI models in parallel via a router layer (Claude Opus as conductor). Cloud-based, works while laptop is closed. $200/month. Manus runs locally, zero setup, full terminal access, sorts 10k files by visual content. OpenClaw is free open-source alternative (300k GitHub stars) but 3h setup per task, stops when laptop closes. Use cases: PE deal rooms (week of analyst work → hours), consulting slide QA, real estate portfolio organization, wealth management dashboards.
